title: Motor Vehicles Act, 1988
objective: Road transport compliance and accident compensation deck for MACT-oriented workflows.

sections.note: Used to validate licence status in prosecution and insurance disputes.

sections.topic: Age limits in connection with driving
sections.note: Applies where age eligibility affects offence framing or policy liability.

sections.topic: Requirement of insurance against third-party risk
sections.note: Primary checkpoint for compulsory coverage and compensation responsibility.

sections.topic: Duty of insurers to satisfy judgments and awards
sections.note: Critical in execution-stage strategy for award recovery.
Reference for claim petitions arising from death, injury, or property damage.

sections.topic: Driving by a drunken person or by a person under influence
sections.note: Supports offence analysis when intoxication evidence appears in accident files.
